name: indigetal-course-workflow-enhancements-for-tutor-lms
description: Indigetal Course Workflow Enhancements for Tutor LMS improves Tutor LMS with shared TutorPress settings, Gutenberg-friendly redirects, lesson discussion tabs, and co-instructor editing.

scripts.package: npm run make-build && cd indigetal-course-workflow-enhancements-for-tutor-lms-build && COPYFILE_DISABLE=1 zip -r ../indigetal-course-workflow-enhancements-for-tutor-lms.zip indigetal-course-workflow-enhancements-for-tutor-lms -x '*/.DS_Store' -x '*/._*' -x '__MACOSX/*' && cd .. && rm -rf indigetal-course-workflow-enhancements-for-tutor-lms-build
